title: Trillions integration checkpoint
content:
We explored blending Trillions into Perihelion as a Google Keep viewer and export tool, and got far enough to validate the UI shell, Firebase wiring, and the route-level integration shape inside Peri.

The useful outcome was architectural: Trillions belongs inside Peri rather than as a separate app, and the Peri-side scaffolding now has a clear holding path for when we revisit it.

We paused implementation after confirming that consumer Google accounts hit an invalid_scope wall with the Keep API path we tested. The remaining viable directions are either a Google Workspace-backed integration or a different notes source entirely.

What we kept for later:

  • Saved the Peri + Trillions experiment into a dedicated holding folder for reuse.
  • Restored Peri to its previous live/dev state so the archive app stays clean and stable.
  • Commented the Firebase values in Peri with an explanation so the future context is preserved instead of looking like stray config.
